name: [YAOC2 Sandbox] MISP Enrich + OpenCTI Sync
_fix: Fixed all 3 empty HTTP bodies (MISP, Cortex, OpenCTI). Added Cortex poll loop (up to 10x with 3s delay). Fixed ioc_type vocabulary mapping (MISP→Cortex→OpenCTI). Added MISP short-circuit when 0 hits.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ returnFormat: 'json', value: $json.ioc, type: $json.ioc_type, limit: 50, includeEventTags: true, includeWarninglistHits: true }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ analyzerId: $env.CORTEX_ANALYZER_ID ?? 'Abuse_Finder_3_0', cortexId: 'local', data: $json.ioc, dataType: $json.cortex_type, tlp: 2, parameters: {} }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ query: 'mutation AddObservable($input: StixCyberObservableAddInput!) { stixCyberObservableAdd(input: $input) { id standard_id } }', variables: { input: { type: $json.opencti_type, observable_value: $json.ioc, objectLabel: $json.misp_tags.slice(0,5), score: $json.misp_found ? 75 : 50, createIndicator: true } } }) }}

_wire_note: IMPORTANT: In n8n UI you must manually wire the FALSE output of 'Cortex Job Pending?' to 'OpenCTI — Push Observable'. The filter node passes items when condition is true (still pending) creating the poll loop. When condition is false (Success/Failure status), items fall through the false output to OpenCTI push. n8n JSON does not support false-output connections for filter nodes — this must be done in the canvas.
